creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Olivier Certner from comment #8)

I've used an RPi 4 with 8 GB RAM for over a year exclusively for my ports work.  It works quite well, even for big ports.  Just takes a while to compile them.
I recommend using an M.2 SSD in an external USB enclosure as the boot disk.  And
don't cheap out on it.
